headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock After 28% Slide Are Valuation Expectations Reset Enough
summary: If you are wondering whether Intuitive Surgical stock is starting to offer better value or still pricing in a lot of optimism, you are not alone. The share price closed at US$406.78, with returns declining 2.3% over the past week, 7.1% over the past month, and 27.6% year to date. The return over the past 1 year is down 21.0% and the 3 and 5 year returns are 25.1% and 33.7% respectively. Recent coverage has focused on how Intuitive Surgical sits within medical technology and minimally...

headline: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Stock Could Be 23.6% Undervalued After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) is back in focus after recent trading data showed the stock down about 7% over the past month and around 14% over the past 3 months, sharpening attention on its long term track record. See our latest analysis for Intuitive Surgical.
